grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: No specific section numbers cited - only general references to 'the Handbook'

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Clearly states to 'Check the specific lender's Part 2 Handbook instructions' and mentions lender-specific minimum lease terms

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: No mention of enforcement periods or time limits for building regulations breaches

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Explicitly discusses indemnity insurance as a potential solution for missing Building Regs approval

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides specific Handbook-focused guidance rather than generic conveyancing advice, references Handbook requirements throughout
